shared_case_surface: lifecycle-aware memo contradiction cases that keep review_state, current_recall posture, contradiction refs, replacement-vs-withdrawal distinction, and audit or provenance walkback reviewable on the same bounded object-facing consumer surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same memo contradiction-integrity question, keeps the object-facing read path explicit, and still covers preferred-with-contradiction visibility, superseded historical posture, retracted withdrawn posture, still-open contradiction tension, and smoothing-pressure escalation to audit or provenance walkback without turning the bundle into recall precision, permission inference, promotion review, or broad memory-quality grading.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect the selected object surfaces and lifecycle fields directly
superseded, withdrawn, and still-open contradictory states remain distinguishable during recall
contradiction refs, replacement refs, and audit or provenance walkback remain reviewable when present
lifecycle posture stays weaker than proof or contradiction resolution
